additional_information:
Commercial names:
– Derbigum NT 4 (4 mm thickness)
– Derbigum NT 3 (3 mm thickness)
– Roll: 1 m (width) x 8 m (length) = 8 m²
– Pallet: 25 rolls (200 m²)

Ratio between application and the reference flow in the EPD.
– 1 (10,5% overlap included)
– For different overlap: ratio (1+overlap)/(1+0,105)
